description_long: This rifle features a compact, bullpup configuration with a distinctive rectangular body and integrated carrying handle. The main body is predominantly matte black, with a visible transparent magazine running along the top, allowing for easy round count inspection. The grip and trigger assembly are housed within a large, angular cutout, providing ergonomic handling. The barrel is short and protrudes slightly from the front, while the upper section includes a rail system for mounting optics or accessories. The overall design is modern and tactical, with smooth, hard surfaces and minimal external protrusions. The rifle's construction suggests a combination of polymer and metal components for durability and reduced weight.
description: A compact, modern bullpup rifle with a matte black body, transparent top-mounted magazine, and integrated carrying handle. Features a short barrel and ergonomic grip cutout.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the rifle, transparent magazine, and ergonomic grip cutout.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the narrow profile, barrel end, and minimal width.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring the main features, including the magazine and grip cutout.
description_view_3: Rear view highlighting the back of the rifle and the slim, rectangular body.
